monday.question: What does 'similar' mean?
What does 'different' mean?
What does 'contrast' mean in a comparison context?
What is a 'comparison'?
options: An action of examining differences or similarities
monday.correctAnswer: An action of examining differences or similarities

monday.question: Which sentence uses the comparative form correctly?
options: This book is more interesting than that one.
This book is interestinger than that one.
This book is most interesting than that one.
This book is the interesting than that one.
monday.correctAnswer: This book is more interesting than that one.

monday.question: Choose the correct comparative: 'The red car is _____ than the blue one.'
Which word completes the sentence? 'This restaurant is _____ expensive than the other one.'
Which sentence is INCORRECT?
options: She is taller than her brother.
This movie is more boring than the last one.
He is more smarter than his classmates.
The weather is colder today than yesterday.
monday.correctAnswer: He is more smarter than his classmates.

monday.question: What does 'unlike' signal in a sentence?
Choose the correct option: 'Tom loves cold weather, _____ his sister prefers summer.'
My city is _____ than yours — it has more buildings and more people.
_____ my brother, I don't enjoy playing video games.
Soccer is _____ popular than cricket in Brazil.
Winter in Canada is much _____ than winter in Brazil.
I enjoy reading books, _____ my friend prefers watching movies.
This laptop costs _____ the old model — it is much pricier.
_____ my parents, I love spicy food.
Translate to English: 'Este carro é mais rápido do que aquele.'
monday.correctAnswer: this car is faster than that one

monday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é mais alta do que o irmão dela.'
monday.correctAnswer: she is taller than her brother

monday.question: Translate to English: 'Ao contrário do meu amigo, eu prefiro comida simples.'
monday.correctAnswer: unlike my friend, i prefer simple food

tuesday.question: What does 'both' mean when comparing two things?
In a comparison, 'either' means:
What does 'neither' express?
What does 'just as' indicate in a comparison?
Which sentence uses 'as...as' correctly?
options: She is as tall as her mother.
She is as taller as her mother.
She is as tall than her mother.
She is as the tallest as her mother.
tuesday.correctAnswer: She is as tall as her mother.

tuesday.question: Which is the correct superlative form of 'good'?
Choose the correct superlative: 'This is _____ restaurant in the city.'
What does 'the least popular' mean?
options: The one that people like the least
tuesday.correctAnswer: The one that people like the least

tuesday.question: Which sentence expresses that A is smaller than B?
options: A is as big as B.
A is not as big as B.
tuesday.correctAnswer: A is not as big as B.

tuesday.question: The Amazon River is not as long _____ the Nile River.
Mount Everest is _____ mountain in the world.
My phone is just _____ good as yours — they are both excellent.
That was _____ meal I have ever had — absolutely delicious!
This option is the _____ expensive, so it is good for our budget.
Tokyo is one of _____ cities in the world.
Brazil is _____ country in South America in terms of size.
She speaks English _____ a native speaker.
_____ the cat and the dog make great family pets.
Translate to English: 'Esse é o melhor filme que já assisti.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: this is the best movie i have ever watched|this is the best film i have ever seen

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'Minha mochila é tão pesada quanto a sua.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: my backpack is as heavy as yours

wednesday.question: What does 'although' mean?
options: In spite of the fact that
wednesday.correctAnswer: In spite of the fact that

wednesday.question: What is the function of 'however' in a sentence?
options: To introduce a contrast or opposite idea
wednesday.correctAnswer: To introduce a contrast or opposite idea

wednesday.question: When do we use 'on the other hand'?
options: To introduce a contrasting point of view
wednesday.correctAnswer: To introduce a contrasting point of view

wednesday.question: Which sentence uses 'although' correctly?
options: Although it was raining, we went for a walk.
We although went for a walk, it was raining.
It was raining although, we went for a walk.
We went although for a walk it was raining.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Although it was raining, we went for a walk.

wednesday.question: Choose the correct option: '_____ the movie was long, everyone enjoyed it.'
Which sentence uses 'however' with correct punctuation?
options: I was tired; however, I finished the work.
I was tired however I finished the work.
I was however tired, I finished the work.
However I was tired I finished the work.
wednesday.correctAnswer: I was tired; however, I finished the work.

wednesday.question: Which connector best expresses contrast between two separate sentences?
'She passed the test _____ she didn't study much.' Which word shows contrast?
Which of the following is NOT a contrast connector?
_____ I don't like cats, I do think they're beautiful animals.
The weather was terrible. _____, we decided to go to the beach.
He kept running _____ his leg was hurting.
Living in a big city can be stressful. _____, it offers many job opportunities.
_____ the food was expensive, the quality was truly excellent.
I love traveling. _____, I don't have enough money to do it often.
She decided to buy the dress _____ it was very expensive.
Dogs are very loyal pets. _____, they need a lot of attention and exercise.
_____ he studied hard, he didn't pass the final exam.
Translate to English: 'Embora estivesse cansado, ele continuou trabalhando.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: although he was tired, he kept working|even though he was tired, he kept working

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Eu gosto de tecnologia. No entanto, prefiro livros físicos.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: i like technology. however, i prefer physical books

thursday.question: What does 'whereas' express in a comparison?
What does 'in contrast' mean?
What does 'in comparison' signal?
options: How two things relate in terms of similarities or differences
thursday.correctAnswer: How two things relate in terms of similarities or differences

thursday.question: Which sentence uses 'whereas' correctly?
options: She likes tea, whereas her husband prefers coffee.
She likes tea whereas, her husband prefers coffee.
She likes tea. Whereas her husband prefers coffee.
Whereas she likes tea her husband prefers coffee.
thursday.correctAnswer: She likes tea, whereas her husband prefers coffee.

thursday.question: In which sentence does 'while' show contrast (not time)?
options: I was cooking while he was watching TV.
She loves the mountains, while he prefers the sea.
While waiting, I read a magazine.
They arrived while we were still eating.
thursday.correctAnswer: She loves the mountains, while he prefers the sea.

thursday.question: Which sentence uses 'unlike' correctly?
options: Unlike my sister, I enjoy cooking.
I unlike my sister enjoy cooking.
My sister unlike enjoys cooking very much.
Unlike to my sister, I enjoy cooking.
thursday.correctAnswer: Unlike my sister, I enjoy cooking.

thursday.question: Choose the best connector: 'Brazil is very hot in summer. _____, Norway is extremely cold.'
Which sentence uses 'unlike' INCORRECTLY?
options: Unlike my brother, I love spicy food.
Unlike in Spain, in Brazil we don't eat paella.
He unlike his friend is very quiet.
Unlike his teammates, he prefers individual sports.
thursday.correctAnswer: He unlike his friend is very quiet.

thursday.question: Which connector expresses contrast in: 'She is very outgoing, _____ her twin sister is quite shy.'?
Choose the best option: 'Our new office is huge. _____, the old one was tiny.'
I prefer working in the morning, _____ my colleague works better at night.
Paris is famous for art and fashion. _____, Tokyo is known for technology and food.
_____ other sports, swimming is very easy on the joints.
This city has better public transport _____ to the capital.
My brother is very loud, _____ I tend to be quiet.
Summer in Brazil is very hot. _____, winter is mild and cool.
_____ traditional cameras, smartphones can take great photos instantly.
The new stadium is much bigger. _____, the old one had only 10,000 seats.
Translate to English: 'Eu gosto de aventura, enquanto minha esposa prefere relaxar.'
thursday.correctAnswer: i like adventure, whereas my wife prefers to relax|i enjoy adventure, while my wife prefers to relax

thursday.question: Translate to English: 'Em comparação com a cidade vizinha, nossa cidade é muito menor.'
thursday.correctAnswer: in comparison with the neighboring city, our city is much smaller|compared to the neighboring city, our city is much smaller

friday.question: What does 'as well as' mean?
In 'Neither option is correct,' what does 'neither' indicate?
options: One of the options is correct
Not one and not the other
friday.correctAnswer: Not one and not the other

friday.question: Which of the following is a synonym for 'whereas'?
What does 'in contrast' help the reader understand?
options: A noticeable difference between two things
friday.correctAnswer: A noticeable difference between two things

friday.question: Choose the correct superlative: 'This is _____ book I have ever read.'
Which sentence correctly uses 'not as...as'?
options: This car is not as expensive as I thought.
This car is not as more expensive as I thought.
This car is not as expensiver as I thought.
This car is not the expensive as I thought.
friday.correctAnswer: This car is not as expensive as I thought.

friday.question: Which two words can BOTH be used to show contrast?
Which sentence is grammatically CORRECT?
options: This coffee is more better than the last one.
This coffee is gooder than the last one.
This coffee is better than the last one.
This coffee is the better than the last one.
friday.correctAnswer: This coffee is better than the last one.

friday.question: Choose the correct option: '_____ Jane and Mark enjoy hiking on weekends.'
Living in the city is more expensive _____ living in the countryside.
Online shopping is very convenient. _____, some people still prefer physical stores.
The food here is not as spicy _____ the food in Thailand.
_____ her sister, Ana prefers to live in the city rather than in the countryside.
I prefer tea, _____ most people in the office drink coffee.
The Amazon is _____ river in South America.
_____ the hotel was expensive, the service was not good at all.
The first half of the movie was boring. _____, the ending was absolutely amazing.
Translate to English: 'Embora eu goste de tecnologia, prefiro conversar pessoalmente.'
friday.correctAnswer: although i like technology, i prefer to talk in person|even though i like technology, i prefer to talk in person

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Esse restaurante é muito melhor do que o anterior.'
friday.correctAnswer: this restaurant is much better than the previous one

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Tanto os gatos quanto os cachorros são ótimos animais de estimação.'
friday.correctAnswer: both cats and dogs are great pets
